V-M-023.checks: Handshake observation updates device last-seen state, delegates endpoint history to M-031, treats single roaming transitions as non-abuse, persists confirmed ping-pong evidence, and does not leak secrets or raw private peer material into logs.
V-M-023.commands: cd backend && SECRET_KEY=test-secret-key-with-enough-length DATA_ENCRYPTION_KEY=dpFmfSVqfdAK3yx5MQV6Tcv35RZuw5MzaH0yhxJ01q0= PYTHONPATH=. ../.venv/bin/python -m pytest -o addopts='' tests/test_handshake_anomaly_detector.py -v

scenarios.scenario: Single endpoint IP transition is treated as roaming and does not create abuse events
A-B-A-B endpoint alternation creates a ping-pong abuse event
